verses.text: Nakpi takin sauveipi ngaihsunin ka phawk thu in: Mipilte leh midikte' gamtatna a vekpi-in Pasian in uk a, Pasian' itna hang hizaw hiam, a muhdahna hang hizaw hiam kuamah in theilo hi. Amau' mailam thu khempeuh a mawkna ahi hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh a thumong kibang a, midikte leh migilote, mihoihte leh misiate, mi siangte leh mi ninte, biakna piate leh a pialote, a thutawpna uh a vekpi-in kibang lel hi. Mawhneipa sangin mihoihpa hamphazaw tuanlo a, thuciamna a bawllopa sangin a bawlpa hamphazaw tuanlo hi

Mi khempeuh' thumong kibang kim a, hih pen leitunga thupiang lakah a man hetlo khat ahi hi. Mihingte a nuntak laiteng gitlohna leh a mawkna thu tawh a lungsim uh kidim a, theihkholh lohin mihingte sipak uh hi
Ahi zongin a hing laite-a' ding lametna om thei a, a sisa humpinelkai sangin a hinglai ui hoihzaw hi
A hing laite in a si ding ahihlam uh thei a, a sisate in bangmah thei nawnlo uh hi. A sisate in thaman bangmah nei nawnlo uh a, amaute kiphawkkha nawnlo hi
Amau-a' dingin itna, muhdahna, hanciamna cihte om nawnlo a, leitunga om nate khat beek theikha kik nawnlo ding uh hi
An ne-in lungdam in la, zu ne-in lungnuam in. Na gamtatna peuhpeuh Pasian in hoih a sa hi
Na puante siangsakin paaksak tawntung in la, na sam gumsak ngei kei in
Pasian in hih leitungah nang a hong piak, tomkha sung na nuntak laiteng, na it na zi tawh a nuam theithei-in om in. Leitung lungkhamna sungah na lawhtak, tua bek mah hi khading hi
Na mai-ah sep ding a om khempeuh, na tha neihzah tawh sem in. Bang hang hiam cih leh na zuat ding sihna gamsungah nasepna leh thungaihsutna, pilna leh theihna cihte omlo hi

Hih leitungah ka phawk dang thu khat in: A taihat mite in tai kidemna-ah zo tawntunglo a, galhang thahatte in gal zo tawntunglo hi. A pilte in an a kham ngah tawntunglo a, a pilte hau tawntunglo hi. Hih theih siamna a neite milian suak tawntunglo hi. Mi khempeuh tungah kamsiatna vive tung hi
Mihing in ama hun ding thei ngeilo hi. Thang-ah a awk vasate leh ngen-ah a awk ngasate tawh i kibang hi. Lametloh hun laitak keekin hunsia sungah mihingte i tung hi.
Thudang khat zong ka mukhia hi: Hih leitungah pilna a hoihna gentehna a hoih khat om hi
Mi tawmno bek a omna khua khat om a, a vanglian kumpi khat in tua khua a sim hi. Amah in tua khua umcihin a khuasung luhgawp dingin a ngaihsun hi
Tua khuasungah a zawng mipil khat om a, ama pilna tawh tua khua a huzo hi. Ahi zongin kuamah in tua mizawngpa phawkkha lo hi
Thahatna sangin pilna hoihzaw ka ci hi; ahi zongin kuamah in mizawngte a pil dingin ngaihsunlo a, mizawngte' thugen kuamah in thudonin neilo hi
Mihai hon lakah gam ukpa in thu a gen lualua sangin mipilpa in damtakin a gen hiathiat ngaihhuai zaw hi
Galhiamte sangin pilna hoihzaw a, ahi zongin khialhna khat in a hoih tampi susia thei hi.
